message:
refactor(core): migrate async tests from tokio to runtime_compat

Convert #[tokio::test] annotations to #[test] with run_async_test()
wrappers across five core modules, continuing the tokio→runtime_compat
abstraction layer migration:

- ingest.rs: Add run_async_test() helper using RuntimeBuilder::current_thread();
  convert 12 async tests (persist_captured_segments, dedup, gap detection,
  concurrent captures) from #[tokio::test] to #[test] + run_async_test
- snapshot_engine.rs: Same migration pattern for snapshot persistence and
  restore tests
- recording.rs: Convert recording session tests to runtime_compat
- survival.rs: Migrate Weibull survival model async tests
- runtime.rs: Add new runtime integration tests

This enables the codebase to transparently swap between tokio and the
asupersync runtime via feature flags, without test coupling to either.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
